approach: Twenty-seed targeted annealing with indecomposable, exact-point-degree-preserving three-block trades from the six-defect 40-block near-cover
summary: The bounded three-block discriminator completed in 90.77 seconds and its independent audit completed in 9.72 seconds. Twenty fixed seeds scored 200,000 proposals and accepted 17,999 valid indecomposable degree-preserving trades. No run improved the six-defect warm start, so no cover or bound was obtained. The exact-value problem remains open.
rationale: The predeclared at-most-five signal failed uniformly, and the independent checker confirmed that this was not caused by broken incidence updates, duplicate blocks, disguised two-block moves, corrupted traces, or incorrect candidate scoring. The evidence therefore supports redirecting this particular heuristic route, but its stochastic and single-basin scope cannot support a lower bound.
claims: For the frozen 20-seed screen, the independently audited best value was exactly six uncovered quadruples.
All 17,999 recorded accepted moves preserved aggregate point incidence and were indecomposable into a legal two-block subtrade.
The pinned 41-block control covered all 495 quadruples, while deleting its first block left 10 uncovered quadruples.
evidence: python3 /root/proof-factory/skills/computational-researcher/scripts/run_experiment.py ... run_constructive_three_block_screen.py; experiment 20260722-201455-25d88d returned 0 in 91.244 seconds

python3 checkers/audit_three_block_screen.py artifacts/constructive/three-block-screen-20260722-v1/manifest.json --output artifacts/constructive/three-block-screen-20260722-v1/audit.json; audit reported status=valid, seeds_audited=20, accepted_moves_replayed=17999, best_uncovered_quadruples=6
python3 -m unittest tests.test_constructive_three_block_screen -v; both route-specific tests passed
next_steps: Do not repeat or scale the unchanged exact-degree three-block annealer.
Implement a bounded temporary-degree-slack ejection chain with mandatory exact-degree endpoints and a separate trace checker.
As a lower-priority structural control, exhaustively classify the direct indecomposable three-block neighborhood of the fixed warm start.
Keep the certified exclusion route active and allocate compute only to genuinely open, unmeasured frontier leaves.
experiments: .proof-experiments/20260722-201455-25d88d: producer completed 20 seeds and 200,000 proposals; best remained six
.proof-experiments/20260722-201739-aaf35b: independent audit replayed 17,999 accepted moves and returned valid
transfer_insights: Ejection-chain local search -> allowing larger exact-degree moves should cross the two-block barrier -> 17,999 such moves crossed barriers but never improved the six-defect incumbent, so the transfer failed in this basin and suggests testing temporary constraint slack instead.

established_facts.claim: The preserved 41-block list covers every one of the 495 four-subsets.
established_facts.evidence: Independent control in audit.json; source SHA-256 395bc870e7eb9e84a472873db97de553afc34afdb666545824944e89047913e5

established_facts.claim: The frozen three-block screen's minimum uncovered count is six.
established_facts.evidence: audit.json reports 20 audited seeds and best_uncovered_quadruples=6
established_facts.scope: Seeds 126460 through 126479, 10,000 scored proposals each, one fixed warm start

established_facts.claim: All 17,999 recorded accepted moves preserve exact point degrees and are not legal two-block trades in disguise.
established_facts.evidence: Independent accepted-trace replay with signature and subtrade checks

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Repeat or scale the unchanged exact-point-degree targeted indecomposable three-block annealer from the six-defect warm start.
ruled_out.scope: Twenty fixed seeds, 200,000 scored proposals, and 17,999 independently replayed accepted moves
ruled_out.reason: Every seed retained six uncovered quadruples, failing the predeclared continuation signal.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: A materially different state generator, such as bounded temporary point-degree slack, or an exhaustive direct-neighborhood classification producing a structural result

open_leads.description: Temporary-degree-slack ejection chain with exact-degree endpoints
open_leads.rationale: It changes the state graph responsible for the observed failure while retaining compact positive certificates.
open_leads.next_experiment: Implement L1 point-degree slack at most two, exact endpoint projection, independent delta replay, and a short two-seed semantic gate before the frozen 20-seed screen.

open_leads.rationale: A complete classifier could convert the observed basin resistance into a precise local-minimality fact and validate proposal coverage.
open_leads.next_experiment: Enumerate all C(40,3) removals, derive all addition pairs through exact signatures, canonicalize resulting families, and independently recompute the minimum defect count.

open_leads.description: Certified exclusion work on genuinely open link-frontier leaves
open_leads.rationale: Unlike another unchanged local-search tranche, each replay-verified unique UNSAT closure reduces the maintained global frontier.
open_leads.next_experiment: Select only hash-bound leaves absent from the durable certificate portfolio and run the smallest matched proof-producing sequential tranche.

strategy_proposals.mechanism: Allow point-degree L1 deviation at most two during a short chain, but accept and score persistent states only after returning exactly to degree 20.
strategy_proposals.hypothesis: Temporary slack changes connectivity enough to reach an exact-degree endpoint with at most five uncovered quadruples.
strategy_proposals.discriminating_test: Two fixed seeds and 1,000 proposals, independently replayed; scale only after observing an exact endpoint below six.
strategy_proposals.rationale: This addresses the measured recovery failure rather than merely increasing the temperature or repeating exact-degree trades.

strategy_proposals.mechanism: Enumerate all degree-compatible indecomposable three-block trades from the fixed warm start through complete signature buckets and canonicalize resulting families.
strategy_proposals.hypothesis: The warm start is a strict local minimum under every direct legal three-block trade.
strategy_proposals.discriminating_test: Enumerate and independently count compatible additions for 100 removal triples, then project total work.
strategy_proposals.rationale: It could turn a stochastic observation into a precise checked local structural result.

synthesis_candidates.mechanism: Combine the audited targeted three-block generator with bounded constraint-violation penalties and mandatory exact-degree endpoint projection.
source_inputs: the current exact-degree three-block trace infrastructure
temporary-slack ejection-chain methods from local search
synthesis_candidates.transfer_hypothesis: The failure is caused by poor connectivity of the exact-degree state graph, so bounded excursions outside it should create return paths unavailable to exact-degree trades.
synthesis_candidates.discriminating_test: A two-seed recovery pilot measuring the rate and best defect count of exact-degree endpoints.
synthesis_candidates.falsification_signal: No exact-degree returns, or every exact endpoint remains at six or worse.
synthesis_candidates.rationale: The mechanism changes admissible intermediate states and is not a renamed temperature adjustment.

strategy.mechanism: Each proposal targets an uncovered quadruple, removes three selected blocks, and adds three previously unselected blocks with identical aggregate point incidence. Pair-signature buckets derive the final two additions, and moves decomposable into a legal two-block trade are rejected.

continuation.objective: Test whether bounded temporary point-degree slack can escape the six-defect basin and return an improved exact-degree endpoint.
continuation.first_action: Implement and unit-audit the slack-chain proposal and independent endpoint/trace checker before any multi-seed run.
continuation.stop_condition: Stop unless an audited exact-degree endpoint reaches at most five uncovered quadruples or a separately checked structural classification is obtained.

candidate_profile.scholarly_question: Can a genuine point-degree-preserving three-block neighborhood improve the known six-defect C(12,6,4) near-cover under a bounded reproducible screen?
candidate_profile.meaningful_delta: The prior two-block neighborhood was extended to indecomposable three-block trades with 200,000 proposals and full accepted-trace validation.
candidate_profile.acceptance_test: Every recorded accepted move replays, all best candidates recompute exactly, controls pass, and the frozen screen result is reproducible.

closest_prior_work.difference: The repository supplies the 41-block annealed cover and 40..41 status; this epoch studies a reproducible local repair neighborhood around a derived 40-block near-cover.
Nurmela and Ostergard use simulated annealing for covering constructions; the present artifact adds exact point-degree three-block trades and independently replayable traces for this parameter.

novelty_searches.finding: The maintained page still reports 40 <= C(12,6,4) <= 41 and a 41-block simulated-annealing construction.

novelty_searches.query: Current post-March-2026 covering updates relevant to (12,6,4)
novelty_searches.finding: The dynamic latest-improvements listing did not establish a settlement of this exact target during the bounded audit.

external_channel.acceptance_path: This scoped negative is not submission-ready; only a verified 40-block witness or independently certified exhaustive exclusion should be submitted.

independent_validations.result: valid; 20 seeds and 17,999 accepted moves replayed; best uncovered count six

campaign_assessment.close_signal: A compact six-defect exact-degree near-cover and a partially certified exclusion frontier leave two materially distinct, checkable resolution paths.
campaign_assessment.reason: The exact value remains a one-bit finite uncertainty, but further work must switch mechanisms rather than repeat this failed basin search.

resolution_portfolio.current_uncertainty: Whether a 40-block C(12,6,4) cover exists; the maintained range remains 40 through 41.

active_routes_and_scores.score: 0.34 expected marginal value: low implementation and CPU cost, compact witness certificate, and direct response to the measured exact-degree basin failure
active_routes_and_scores.success_certificate: A 40-block exact-degree list covering all 495 quadruples, or an audited endpoint with at most five defects for continuation
active_routes_and_scores.smallest_decisive_experiment: Two fixed seeds with 1,000 proposals after semantic-gate tests, followed by 20-by-10,000 only if an exact endpoint improves
active_routes_and_scores.switch_condition: No exact-degree endpoint below six, trace disagreement, or excessive time spent in slack states

active_routes_and_scores.score: 0.29 expected marginal value: globally meaningful unique closures but higher proof and verification cost
active_routes_and_scores.success_certificate: Replayable UNSAT proof for a genuinely open leaf, with independently checked source-to-CNF binding
active_routes_and_scores.smallest_decisive_experiment: One unmeasured open leaf under the proven sequential encoding and a short proof-producing cap
active_routes_and_scores.switch_condition: Zero unique closures on a stratified tranche or proof growth beyond the recorded storage threshold

active_routes_and_scores.score: 0.16 expected marginal value: likely feasible and rigorous, but local to one arbitrary near-cover
active_routes_and_scores.success_certificate: Complete independently checked enumeration giving the minimum defect count over every legal direct three-block trade
active_routes_and_scores.smallest_decisive_experiment: Count degree-compatible additions for all 9,880 removal triples and estimate total enumeration cost
active_routes_and_scores.switch_condition: Enumeration is large without a useful invariant, or the result cannot support a structural statement

resolution_portfolio.what_changed_this_turn: The formerly proposed three-block exact-degree route is now implemented, audited, and blocked for the frozen basin and policy.
resolution_portfolio.net_new_validated_progress: A reusable producer/checker and a validated negative discriminator covering 200,000 proposals and 17,999 accepted moves; no reduction in the 40-versus-41 mathematical uncertainty.

cheapest_next_experiment_for_each_route.experiment: One genuinely open leaf with a replayable short-cap proof attempt
Exact compatible-trade count and throughput pilot over 100 fixed removal triples

resolution_portfolio.why_selected_next_route_has_best_expecte: Temporary slack directly changes the state-graph restriction implicated by both failed two- and three-block exact-degree searches, costs little to screen, and preserves the compact positive acceptance certificate.
immediate_route_switch_conditions: Any directly verified 40-block cover ends the constructive search.
Failure to return exact-degree endpoints below six redirects to the certified exclusion route.
A cheap exhaustive-neighborhood count showing tractability promotes the local-classification route.
Any checker disagreement invalidates the constructive tranche and pauses scaling.

search_efficiency.naive_space: Per state, C(40,3) times C(884,3) = 1,133,671,549,920 labelled removal/addition-triple pairs before incidence filtering; the bottleneck is generating degree-compatible trades and rescoring 495 quadruples.
search_efficiency.chosen_mechanism: Precompute all C(924,2)=426,426 block pairs into 72,865 aggregate-incidence buckets; select an uncovered quadruple and a containing block, then derive the other two additions from the required residual signature. Score only counters with nonzero net deltas.
search_efficiency.estimated_or_measured_savings: Mean 68.23252 changed quadruple counters per proposal versus 495 for full rescoring, a measured 7.2546-fold counter reduction. This is an evaluation-speed gain, not a quotient or exhaustive-space reduction.
search_efficiency.soundness_guard: The standalone checker reconstructed and replayed all 17,999 accepted moves using separate incidence-counting code, verified degree preservation and indecomposability, checked hash chains, and directly recomputed candidates.

space_reduction.ambient_space: All C(924,40) labelled 40-block families on 12 points
space_reduction.represented_space_before: One exact-point-degree six-defect warm start and its unknown stochastic reachable component
space_reduction.eliminated_or_quotiented: No family or global case was safely eliminated; only one frozen heuristic policy was screened
space_reduction.represented_space_after: The global C(924,40) family remains unchanged
space_reduction.coverage_scope: Twenty seeds 126460 through 126479, each capped at 10,000 scored proposals from one fixed warm start
space_reduction.soundness_basis: The checker validates recorded moves and candidates but the proposal sampler is non-exhaustive
space_reduction.remaining_unknown: Existence of any 40-block cover, behavior in other basins, and all unsampled three-block trades
space_reduction.next_bulk_elimination: Either exhaustively classify the direct three-block neighborhood of the warm start or switch to a materially different generator with temporary point-degree slack

tactical_learning.prediction: At least one seed would reach five or fewer uncovered quadruples, or find a cover
tactical_learning.observation: All 200,000 proposals were scored; 17,999 accepted moves were independently replayed, but every seed retained the original six-defect candidate as its best. Final wandering states had 50 to 62 uncovered quadruples.
tactical_learning.surprise: The larger exact-degree neighborhood crossed substantial barriers but still never returned below the initial six defects.
tactical_learning.failure_signature: High-temperature exact-degree three-block excursions drift into much worse coverage states and do not recover the six-defect basin within the fixed budget.
tactical_learning.bottleneck_update: The limiting issue is now state generation and recovery, not merely acceptance of larger exact-degree trades.

reusable_assets.name: three-block screen producer
reusable_assets.use: Generate deterministic targeted three-block screens with incremental scoring and hash-chained traces

reusable_assets.name: independent trace auditor
reusable_assets.use: Replay accepted trades and validate incidence preservation, indecomposability, controls, and candidates

reusable_assets.name: frozen screen dataset
reusable_assets.use: Baseline for testing materially different constructive generators

constraints_learned.constraint: The recorded 20-seed three-block policy did not improve the six-defect warm start.
constraints_learned.scope: Exactly 200,000 scored proposals under seeds 126460 through 126479 and the recorded temperature schedule
constraints_learned.evidence: Independent audit replayed 17,999 accepted moves and reported best_uncovered_quadruples=6

tactical_learning.next_discriminator: Permit point-degree L1 slack at most two inside short ejection chains, require exact degree 20 at accepted endpoints, and repeat the frozen screen only after independent delta-equivalence tests.

prior_art_check.exact_delta: The generic registered three-block candidate was implemented with uncovered-quadruple targeting, exact aggregate-incidence buckets, explicit exclusion of two-block-decomposable moves, incremental scoring, and independently replayable hash-chained traces.
prior_art_check.duplicate_risk: Simulated annealing and ejection chains are standard, and the negative screen is not itself a novel covering-design theorem.
prior_art_check.comparison_test: The cheapest matched follow-up would compare exact-degree and temporary-degree-slack generators on the same frozen seeds and proposal budget.

field_progress_assessment.gate_id: Use the sourced contribution and verification contract.
field_progress_assessment.contribution_class: verified scoped negative heuristic and reusable research software
field_progress_assessment.closest_prior_result: Earlier exact-degree two-block runs accepted about 35,000 barrier-crossing trades while retaining six uncovered quadruples.
field_progress_assessment.measurable_improvement: No improvement in the best defect count; the new contribution is an audited strictly larger neighborhood and reproducible negative discriminator.
field_progress_assessment.independent_validation: checkers/audit_three_block_screen.py replayed 17,999 moves, audited 20 seeds, and passed the 41-block positive and one-block-deletion negative controls.
field_progress_assessment.external_audience: none for this scoped negative result
field_progress_assessment.remains_unproved: Whether any 40-block cover exists; the maintained range remains 40 <= C(12,6,4) <= 41.
field_progress_assessment.route_recommendation: redirect because repeating the same basin, proposal distribution, or temperature schedule has low expected information value

lab_review.reason: The two-segment lifecycle canary completed 2/2 units, passed exact 41-cover checks, correctness and throughput gates, and produced a durable completion record. This promotes orchestration capability only.

hypothesis: Twenty fixed seeds with 10,000 scored genuine three-block proposals each improve the six-defect exact-degree warm start to at most five uncovered quadruples or find a 40-block cover.
discriminating_test: Replay every accepted move independently and directly recompute each best candidate; retain the route only if the audited minimum is at most five uncovered quadruples, with zero requiring the all-495 cover verifier.
independent_checker: checkers/audit_three_block_screen.py uses separately written incidence counting to replay every accepted move, verify distinctness, exact aggregate point incidence, absence of a two-block subtrade, target coverage, hash chains, and final metrics. It also checks the 41-block positive control and a deletion negative control.
blocker: The exact-degree two- and three-block neighborhoods around the best known six-defect basin have produced no improvement; a materially different generator or global certificate closure is required.
reopen_condition: Retry the blocked exact-degree three-block strategy only after demonstrating a new proposal distribution, basin, exhaustive neighborhood result, or checked temporary-slack projection.
tool_disclosure: GPT-5.6 Sol served as principal investigator, audited the Terra memo, corrected the initial temperature and verification design, executed the experiments, and interpreted the result. A GPT-5.6 Terra delegate supplied advisory experiment-verification reconnaissance; its memo was not treated as evidence. Deterministic Python 3.12.3 generated and independently checked the screen. No SAT solver, CAS, proof assistant, or independent human validator was used in this epoch.; orchestration: gpt-5.6-sol principal with gpt-5.6-terra delegates.
policy_flags: Automated lab review may recommend validate/promote, but only an operator may apply it with an independent validation receipt.

json_repair.policy: serialization-only; protected outcome and classification fields must remain unchanged
